name: NAFLD - Diagnosis Code Query (Multi-Stage Liver Disease)
description: **First liver disease phenotype.** Tests ability to find non-alcoholic fatty liver disease patients via diagnosis codes. NAFLD/MASLD is documented under multiple SNOMED codes by histologic stage: hepatic steatosis (simple fatty liver), MASH/NASH (steatohepatitis with inflammation), MASLD (metabolic-associated steatotic liver disease), generic steatohepatitis, and cirrhosis (end-stage). Synthea distributes patients across these stages.
prompt: Find all patients with a diagnosis of non-alcoholic fatty liver disease, including hepatic steatosis, metabolic-associated steatohepatitis (MASH/NASH), metabolic-associated steatotic liver disease (MASLD), steatohepatitis, and cirrhosis of liver.

prompts.naive: Find all patients with fatty liver disease.
prompts.broad: Find all patients diagnosed with any form of non-alcoholic fatty liver disease — including simple hepatic steatosis (fatty liver), metabolic-associated steatohepatitis (MASH/NASH — fatty liver with inflammation), metabolic-associated steatotic liver disease (MASLD — modern terminology), generic steatohepatitis, and cirrhosis (end-stage liver fibrosis).
prompts.expert: I need to identify all NAFLD/MASLD patients. The condition is documented under multiple SNOMED codes by histologic stage: Steatosis of liver (197321007) is the parent fatty-liver concept, Metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (442685003) is MASH/NASH, Metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver (722866000) is MASLD, Steatohepatitis (442191002) is the generic inflammation pattern, and Cirrhosis of liver (19943007) is the end-stage. Search Condition resources for all five codes.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with NAFLD diagnosis codes. **First liver disease phenotype.** Tests histologic-stage code variation.
